rulings.Case Title: RESTORATION MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. JAMES LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT JAMES LEE, MICHAEL LEE DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Demurrer is not proper to only a portion of a cause of action. The second cause of action does not only seek to foreclose, it also seeks a deficiency judgment. Moving papers fail to address the second part of the cause of action. Arguments regarding deficiency judgment raised in the reply are untimely and unpersuasive. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MICHAEL E. JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2020 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to 2ND Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to March 25, 2021 per stipulation and order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ADEENA BROWN VS. CRYSTAL WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2020 line PLAINTIFF ADEENA BROWN Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file. The motion was filed on September 4, 2020 and noticed for September 24, 2020 (13 court days). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS E SINKIEWICZ VS. SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS, INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 24, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT WILLIAM SCHOFIELD DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to overcome Defendant's legal arguments regarding statute of limitations. Request for Judicial notice is granted to the extent that the Court takes notice of the existence of the prior lawsuit, but not the content of the filings in that action. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
